demographics.living_situation: shares a residence with a roommate, who is present

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I was doing squats at the gym earlier, and suddenly this sharp, stabbing pain hit my left side so hard it dropped me to the floor, and now I can't stop throwing up.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain came on out of nowhere about two hours ago while I was exercising and it's gotten really bad and constant — I keep vomiting and I can't get comfortable.

symptom_narrative.onset: sudden, about two hours ago, right in the middle of doing squats at the gym
symptom_narrative.duration: two hours and not letting up
symptom_narrative.character: started as a sharp, stabbing, come-and-go cramp low down on the left, but now it's severe and constant
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst pain I've ever had — it literally dropped me to the floor and I'm lying curled up
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: low down on the left side of my belly and into my pelvis
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: was on-and-off at first, now it's there all the time
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing has helped — I took some paracetamol and it did nothing
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: moving, trying to sit up or change position makes it stab worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: really bad nausea and I've been vomiting over and over since the pain started
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't stand up or walk — I'm just lying on the couch in a ball, groaning

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: took a couple earlier for the pain

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: was at the gym doing a workout when the pain hit; roommate is with her at home and made the call

objective_data_offered.value: throwing up repeatedly since the pain began — there's a vomit basin next to the couch
she looks really pale and sweaty and is lying curled up on her side clutching her lower left belly, groaning
she says she doesn't feel hot or feverish, no chills
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's subjective impression, not a measured temperature

objective_data_offered.value: she says she can feel her heart racing / pounding
